title: VelocityPlus
description: Velocity proxy adding and change commands
body:
# VelocityPlus
**A Velocity proxy plugin aim to improve design and comfort such as new server list design
and more**
![Showcase of one the many stuff that get added](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed631c83a2b5f9d9c48ef5df526b148346e54de.png)


Features:
- /lag
- /server (Ingame command)
- /reload (reload velocity)
- /velocityplus reload
- /send <player> <server>
- /sendall <server>
- custome color config



**Server list colors config**

![Custome Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9428b99238df76831afd31ae7a72d7281a6b6d05.png)![Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdd9befe539452d81b07aab5f84f6fdee6aa8f04.png)
